8/13/99. CV WITH PET WILL BE EVERY OTHER WEEKEND, RESP TO PUT MINOR ON A BUS FROM SACRAMENTO TO SF ON SATURDAY AT 10AM, TO BE RETURNED ON SUNDAY LATE
EW YEAR'S, RESP TO HAVE MINOR ON THANKSGIVING. CHAMBERS CONFERENCE TO BE ARRANGED IN EARLY JANUARY FOR REVIEW OF CC MATTER. BOTH PARTIES' CURRENT
EW. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.

(403/CWW) PARTIES IN PRO PER. PREVIOUS ORDER OF CS OWED FROM RESP TO PET IS STRICKEN AND THE AMOUNT OWED IS $0. PET TO SUBMIT HIS I&E W/3 PAYSTUBS ATTACHED TO THE COURT
BY 5PM TODAY'S DATE AND SERVED ON THE RESP, AND THEN THE COURT WILL MAKE AN ORDER RE THE CS ISSUES. IF RESP HAS OBJECTIONS TO PET I&E, A DECLARATION
99, AND THE AMOUNT WILL BE A CREDIT TO THE CALCULATION ON CS THAT THE COURT DETERMINES. RE CV, PARTIES SHALL EQUALLY SPLIT THE COST OF TRANSPORTATION.
NEXT CV SHALL BE THIS WEEKEND AND PET SHALL PAY FOR THE COST OF TRANSPORTATION. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY NORMA REAY, CSR #1520.COST OF TRANSPORTATION.

(403/CWW) PET IN PRO PER; N/A RESP AT 10:57A; FCS AUDREY DE LOACHE. MS. DE LOACHE STATED RESP WAS NOTIFIED BY PHONE OF THE RESCHEDULING OF THE CHAMBERS CONFERENCE PRE
VIOUSLY SCHEDULED AT 2P TODAY. COURT AWAITED FOR RESP'S APPEARANCE AT 2P AND SHE APPEARED. MS. DE LOACHE ALSO APPEARED. RESP STATES SHE WILL NOT
2P FOR FURTHER CHAMBERS CONFERENCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE CSR # 5797.

(403/CWW) PET IN PRO PER. RESP IN PRO PER. AUDREY DE LOACHE, FCS. PARTIES PRESENT GRANT HIGH SCHOOL ATTENDANCE RECORDS/GRADES, AND ALSO A NOTE TO THE COURT FROM THE MI
NOR WHICH NEITHER PARTY HAS READ. AFTER DISCUSSION RE THE MINOR'S ATTENDANCE, GRADES AND CURRENT JUVENILE CHARGES AGAINST HIM IN SACRAMENTO, THE COURT
ADVISES BOTH PARTIES TO BE PRESENT AT THE 2/8/00 JUVENILE PROBATION DEPT. MEETING SET IN SACRAMENTO REGARDING THE MINOR. PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO BE
MP ORDERS IN PLACE NOW WILL BECOME THE PERMANENT ORDER UNTIL FURTHER MODIFIED BY THE COURT. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.
